csv_empty_file: The file contains no data rows.
csv_ragged_rows: {ragged} row(s) have a different number of columns than the first row ({expected}). Check the detected separator.
csv_unusual_format: The CSV file appears to have an unusual format (e.g. mismatched quotes). Check the file.
fonts_no_latin_ext: ⚠ This font does not cover Romanian diacritics (ș, ț, ă, â, î).
fields_ratio_locked: Proportions kept — click for free dimensions
fields_ratio_free: Free dimensions — click to keep proportions
fields_pick_from_preview: Pick a color from the preview
codes_upload_hint: Upload an existing CSV file. Each row becomes a card. The separator (comma, semicolon, tab, etc.) is detected automatically — you don't need to know anything about the CSV format.
codes_single_field_per_row: Each row is a single code
codes_wrong_separator_summary: Separator detected wrongly? Correct it manually
codes_separator_label: Separator between codes on a row
codes_generate_hint: Generate a CSV to personalize the PDF. Each code has the format "prefix code suffix" (the prefix and suffix are optional), and codes can be generated randomly (alphabetic, numeric or mixed), as a numeric range, or as "Fixed text" — the same text on every row (a watermark, exempt from the uniqueness check).
codes_pad_hidden_hint: The padding does not appear when the total width ({padLength}) ≤ the code length ({length}). Increase the total width to see the padding characters.
codes_exceeds_space: The number of rows ({rows}) exceeds the possible combinations for this code ({space} = {charset}, length {length}). Random codes cannot be unique — there will be duplicates. Increase the code length, change the character set or use a numeric range.
codes_nears_space: The number of rows ({rows}) is close to the possible combinations ({space}). Random codes do not guarantee uniqueness — at this volume duplicates will likely appear. Increase the code length for more combinations.
codes_tab_too_few_combinations: Too few combinations for the number of rows — there will be duplicates.
codes_add_code_hint: Add another code to each row. A row can contain several codes (separated by the separator above) — use this option when a card must display several codes.
codes_stale: The settings have changed. Regenerate the CSV to continue.
codes_blocked: Generation is disabled: the number of rows exceeds the possible combinations for at least one code, so the codes cannot be unique. Increase the code length, change the character set or use a numeric range.

match.countPlural=one: ⚠ {countFormatted} duplicate code — not enough unique codes could be generated. Increase the code length or change the character set.
match.countPlural=other: ⚠ {countFormatted} duplicate codes — not enough unique codes could be generated. Increase the code length or change the character set.

codes_fields_hint: Click the gap between two pieces to join them into a single code — useful when a code contains the separator (e.g. "1A 1").
app_subtitle: Preview code placement on a background and generate print and contour PDFs.
wizard_locked_background: Set up the background in the "Background" step to continue.
wizard_locked_contour: Set up the contour in the "Contour" step to continue.
wizard_locked_data_upload: Upload a CSV file in the "Data" step to continue.
wizard_locked_data_generate: Press "Generate CSV" in the "Data" step to continue.
common_svg_text_warning: Text inside the SVG is not supported — convert the text to outlines before uploading.
background_paste_hint: Press the button, Ctrl+V, or drag an image (PNG/JPEG/SVG) here.
background_stretched_hint: The image is stretched to fill the card at the target dimensions below.
background_transparent_hint: The chosen color fills the transparent areas in the exported PDF; "checkerboard" keeps the transparency.
background_pan_hint: Moves the background within the card; the vacated areas stay transparent (or are filled with the color chosen above). Enable "Move the background" to drag directly in the preview.
contour_url_label: File URL (PDF, SVG, PNG or JPEG)
contour_paste_hint: Press the button, Ctrl+V, or drag a PDF/SVG/PNG/JPEG file (or SVG code) here.
contour_page_auto_hint: The app automatically uses page {page} of {count} (different from the background's page).
contour_trim_label: Size of the artwork (not the page)
contour_trim_warning: Warning: the contour is reduced to the drawing's outline, ignoring the empty margins of the page. Align the cut to the print carefully.
contour_trace_no_alpha: The image has no transparent areas — the contour will be the image's rectangle.
contour_trace_hint: The contour follows the visible pixels; interior transparent areas become holes. For bleed, use "Redraw (+mm)".
contour_star_depth_hint: How deep the star's notches go (smaller = longer/sharper points).
contour_star_tips_hint: When resizing, only the outer tips move; the star's core stays fixed.
contour_need_background: Upload the background PDF first to generate the shape.
contour_redraw_base_hint: The dimensions above are the base contour; the redraw ({offset} mm) produces the final cut below.
contour_redraw_hint: Offsets the whole contour by the same distance all along it (die-line). 0 = unchanged.
contour_no_self_intersect_hint: Removes the nodes that make the cutting path self-intersect (for a contour traced from an image or Redraw).
contour_no_offset_room: The contour fills the whole background — there is no room for an offset. Use a contour smaller than the background.
words_contour_inset_hint: "Contour inset" is the minimum distance from the cut: it is used both for checking (codes must stay at least this far from the cut to be "safe") and as the margin for the "(contour)" alignments. It only applies when a cutting contour is used.
words_overflow_warning: Long codes can extend beyond the background.
quote_hint: Download the file with your settings (including the backgrounds and fonts used), then send it to us by email for a personalized quote.
quote_download_button: Download the settings for a quote (.zip)
quote_email_body:
Hello,

I would like a quote for my project. I have attached the .zip settings file downloaded from the code printing and contour cutting app.

I also need to send you a file with the codes, or tell you how they should be generated.

Thank you!
quote_need_contour: A contour background is required (uploaded or a preset shape).
generate_mode_print_desc: Generates the print PDF using the background.
generate_mode_contour_desc: Generates the PDF with cutting lines using the contour background.
generate_overflow_hint: Codes that overflow the contour (or the card) are automatically shrunk until they fit, but not below the minimum size. Those that still don't fit remain flagged.
generate_no_cut_hint: No cutting: one card per page, without imposition and without registration circles.
generate_bg_exceeds: ⚠ The background ({bgW} × {bgH} mm) does not fit in the page ({pageW} × {pageH} mm). Enlarge the page or shrink the card.
generate_cut_exceeds: ⚠ The contour ({w} × {h} mm) does not fit in the page's cutting area ({cw} × {ch} mm = the page minus the registration circles). Enlarge the page, reduce the circle diameter or the contour.
generate_contour_capped: ⚠ The contour was reduced to fit inside the background ({bgW} × {bgH} mm): {reason}. Reduce the contour or the rotation to use the desired value.
generate_gap_too_small: ⚠ Offset X/Y ({x} × {y} mm) is too small for this contour. Only a plain rectangular contour can have offset 0 (the cards share the same cutting line). For other shapes or an uploaded contour, an offset below 1.0 mm makes neighbouring cuts overlap — the cutter cuts the same area twice and the material can be damaged. Increase Offset X and Y to at least 1.0 mm.
generate_sample_title: Generates a single card with the contour on top — a quick proof, without the whole batch.
generate_need_print_background: A background PDF is required for print.
generate_need_contour_background: A background PDF is required for the contour.
generate_need_csv: A CSV data file is required.
preview_download_title: The capture downloads a file instead of copying to the clipboard
preview_cutout_title: The capture crops only the print and the codes inside the contour, as a transparent PNG
preview_screenshot_aria: Screenshot of the preview (copies to the clipboard)
preview_sampling_hint: Click the preview to pick the color · Esc to cancel
preview_need_background: Upload a background PDF to see the preview.
result_sample_note: Proof with a single card — the contour is overlaid as a screen-visible (non-printing) layer.
result_zip_note: Generated in batches — a ZIP archive with several PDFs (the preview shows the first PDF).
result_zip_opfs_note: Large archive — written to disk to save memory.

match.countPlural=one: ⚠ {count} row contains a code that overflows the cutting area or the card's space{samples}. Reduce the font, shorten the code or enlarge the card.
match.countPlural=other: ⚠ {count} rows contain codes that overflow the cutting area or the card's space{samples}. Reduce the font, shorten the code or enlarge the card.

match.countPlural=one: Word {list} uses a custom font (.ttf/.otf) that was not found in the archive — upload the font file again.
match.countPlural=other: Words {list} use a custom font (.ttf/.otf) that was not found in the archive — upload the font file again.

csv_read_failed: The file could not be read: {error}
csv_info_single_field: Each row is treated as a single code · {rows}
errors_preset_missing_words: Invalid settings file: the word list is missing.
errors_font_per_word: Set a font for every word, or for a single word (used for all).
errors_trace_failed: The contour could not be traced from the image. Try a lower transparency threshold.
errors_bg_dims_positive: The background's width and height must be positive numbers.
errors_url_download_not_configured: Downloading by URL is not configured (the image proxy is missing).
errors_proxy_unreachable: Could not reach the image proxy.
errors_only_images_accepted: Only PNG, JPEG or SVG images are accepted.
errors_clipboard_no_image: The clipboard does not contain an image.
errors_drop_not_image: The dragged file is not an image (PNG, JPEG or SVG).
errors_svg_invalid_detail: The file is not a valid SVG. ({detail})
errors_only_files_accepted: Only PDF, SVG, PNG or JPEG files are accepted.
errors_clipboard_no_file: The clipboard does not contain an accessible PDF, SVG or image file. For a file copied from the file manager, press Ctrl+V here.
errors_drop_not_file: The dragged file is not a PDF, SVG or image.
errors_background_image_load: The background image could not be loaded
errors_contour_image_load: Could not load the contour image
errors_svg_invalid: The file is not a valid SVG.
errors_zip_too_large: The estimated ZIP archive (~{mb} MB) exceeds this browser's available memory. Reduce the number of rows (or the cards per page) or use a Chromium browser, which allows writing to disk.
